node.html:
• I built Duit out of a personal need, I wanted a single tool that pulls new publications from all major publishers and uses AI to surface the ones relevant to my research.

  • Unlike search engines such as Google Scholar or Semantic Scholar, Duit isn't for looking up specific papers. It targets a very specific use case: staying current. Think of it as your morning newspaper for research, a daily feed of the latest studies, ranked by relevance to your interests.

  • Duit aggregates 300+ journal feeds, scores papers with AI-driven relevance matching, and delivers curated digests via email or podcast. Currently in beta.

frontmatter.title: Evoris
frontmatter.range: protein language models, structural biology, protein design

node.html:
• We develop computational methods for predicting cross-species protein-protein interactions (PPIs) between human and gut microbiome proteins, using deep neural networks and protein language models to go beyond traditional homology-based approaches.

  • We apply these PPI predictions to design next-generation therapeutics for inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), lupus, and metabolic disorders, targeting the host-microbe interactions that drive disease.
• I write about computational biology papers, my transition from biochemist to computational biologist, and dev environment tips.
